display.purpose: Hero headlines and major brand framing.

headline.purpose: Page titles and section anchors for executive scanning.

title.purpose: Service cards, module headings, and dense summaries.

body.purpose: Primary reading layer for governance, procurement, and bilingual content.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, metadata, and compact trust markers.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default hover, focus, and reveal easing.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Section reveals and optional proof animation.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main enterprise conversion action for briefing requests and high-intent contact points.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: none; border-radius: 999px; background: #174B68; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgb(23 75 104 / 0.22); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), box-shadow 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0B2A3D; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #174B68; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Alternate conversion path for capability decks and lower-pressure navigation actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid #174B68; border-radius: 999px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #0B2A3D; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), border-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #F3F7FA; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #174B68; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { border-color: #0B2A3D; }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Core service or proof module used to explain capabilities with sober lift and precise hierarchy.
components.html:
AI Governance and Responsible Automation

Establish the policies, controls, approval workflows, and monitoring required to scale AI responsibly.

Explore service
components.css: .ds-card-service { display: grid; gap: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 1.25rem; background: #FFFFFF; color: #0F172A; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.08); transition: transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), box-shadow 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), border-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-card-service:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 24px 70px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.12); border-color: #C7DBE7; } .ds-card-service:focus-within { outline: 2px solid #174B68; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-card-service h3 { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.35; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #0B2A3D; } .ds-card-service p { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #475569; } .ds-card-service a { width: fit-content; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #174B68; text-decoration: none; transition: color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-card-service a:hover { color: #0B2A3D; } .ds-card-service a:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #174B68; outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-card-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.75rem; height: 2.75rem; border-radius: 0.875rem; background: #F3F7FA; color: #174B68; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #E2ECF3; } .ds-card-icon svg { width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; }

components.name: Enterprise Input
components.description: Default enterprise form field with explicit labeling, strong focus treatment, and visible error affordance.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #0F172A; } .ds-field span { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #1E293B; } .ds-field input { width: 100%; border: 1px solid #CBD5E1; border-radius: 0.75rem; background: #FFFFFF; color: #0F172A; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.05); outline: none; transition: border-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), box-shadow 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-field input::placeholder { color: #94A3B8; } .ds-field input:hover { border-color: #94A3B8; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { border-color: #2F6F8F; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgb(47 111 143 / 0.15); } .ds-field small { font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.45; color: #64748B; }

components.name: Trust Badge
components.description: Compact evidence marker for compliance posture, readiness statements, and trust center summaries.
components.css: .ds-trust-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 999px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #334155; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.45; letter-spacing: 0.02em; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.05); } .ds-trust-dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; border-radius: 999px; background: #16835B; }

components.name: Header Navigation
components.description: Sticky enterprise header with quiet navigation, transparent backdrop, and a smaller CTA.
components.html:
CRN Advisory Systems
SolutionsIndustriesTrust Center
Schedule Briefing
components.css: .ds-header { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; border: 1px solid rgb(226 232 240 / 0.7); border-radius: 1.25rem; background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); } .ds-brand { color: #0B2A3D; font-family: Satoshi, Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.02em; text-decoration: none; } .ds-header nav { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1.5rem; justify-content: center; } .ds-header nav a { color: #334155; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-header nav a:hover { color: #0B2A3D; } .ds-header nav a:focus-visible, .ds-brand:focus-visible, .ds-header-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #174B68; outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-header-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 999px; background: #174B68; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgb(23 75 104 / 0.22); transition: background-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-header-cta:hover { background: #0B2A3D; } @media (max-width: 720px) { .ds-header { grid-template-columns: 1fr; justify-items: start; } .ds-header nav { justify-content: start; gap: 0.875rem 1rem; } }

components.name: Data Proof Card
components.description: Quantitative evidence block for maturity scores, operational metrics, and case-study proof.
components.html:
Maturity score

72%

Controls implemented across priority domains.
components.css: .ds-proof-card { display: grid; gap: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 1.25rem; background: #FFFFFF; color: #0F172A; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.08); } .ds-proof-label { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.45; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748B; } .ds-proof-value { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 2.25rem; font-weight: 650; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.03em; color: #0B2A3D; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-proof-body { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #475569; }

narrative.overview:
CRN Advisory Systems should feel like the briefing deck and diligence packet that lands on an executive committee table before a regulated program is approved. The design is premium, but the premium signal comes from discipline, not spectacle. Structure, spacing, contrast, and language should reduce perceived risk before they ask for attention.

This is a light-first enterprise system anchored by dark navy control surfaces. White and cool slate carry the reading experience; navy concentrates authority in headers, heroes, and primary conversion moments; muted gold and restrained teal operate as evidence markers rather than decorative flourish. The overall atmosphere is analytical, credible, and board-ready, with enough technical sharpness to reassure CIO, CISO, and procurement audiences.

The system explicitly rejects the posture of a generic digital agency, a hype-driven AI startup, and a consumer-tech marketing site. It also rejects vague transformation theater, flashy novelty, and empty premium cues that do not reduce perceived risk. Every layout, token, and component should look plausible for a focused 185-person Indonesian enterprise advisory firm, not for a global consultancy playing at impossible scale.
keyCharacteristics: Controlled contrast with light reading surfaces and navy authority bands
Evidence-led hierarchy built for scanning, proof, and next-step clarity
Premium restraint, where gold and teal are signals, not decoration
Bilingual enterprise readability with generous body leading and tight headline tracking
Motion that supports comprehension, never performance for its own sake

rules.name: The Muted Gold Rule
rules.body: Gold is a signal, not a surface. Use #C49A45 and #8B6827 in small amounts for emphasis, never as large promotional fills.

rules.name: The Trust-First Rule
rules.body: Primary CTA states use #174B68 at rest and #0B2A3D on hover. When a surface asks for action, the navy scale carries the weight.

rules.name: The Board Packet Rule
rules.body: Headlines may tighten tracking, but paragraphs must breathe. Dense enterprise content becomes credible only when body copy keeps generous leading and a disciplined line length.

rules.name: The Bilingual Breathing Rule
rules.body: Bahasa paragraphs should default to relaxed leading. Do not compress long Indonesian copy to chase a tighter page.

rules.name: The Proof-First Lift Rule
rules.body: If a surface looks lifted, it must earn that privilege through action or evidence. Decorative floating cards are prohibited.

dos: Do use #F8FAFC or #FFFFFF for default reading surfaces, and reserve #071A26 for high-trust sectional anchors such as heroes and footers.
Do keep primary CTA states on the navy scale: #174B68 at rest, #0B2A3D on hover, with a visible 2px focus outline.
Do keep body measure near 68ch to 72ch, with relaxed leading for long governance, procurement, and Bahasa content.
Do use muted gold (#C49A45) for compact highlights, eyebrow labels, and selective proof emphasis, not for large background blocks.
Do use motion in short, controlled durations: 160ms for buttons and hover states, 420ms to 520ms for reveal patterns, always with reduced-motion fallbacks.
Do keep proof modules evidence-driven: direct labels, tabular numerals, light gridlines, and text alternatives for charts.
donts: Don't make this look like a generic digital agency.
Don't make this feel like a hype-driven AI startup.
Don't drift into a consumer-tech marketing site posture.
Don't use vague transformation language, gimmicky motion, flashy novelty, or empty premium cues that do not reduce perceived risk.
Don't imitate the scale or visual posture of a global consultancy beyond what a fictional 185-person firm could credibly support.
Don't copy any real competitor directly.
Don't put gradients inside the logo, add drop shadows to the logo, stretch it, or place it on low-contrast or busy photo backgrounds.
Don't use color alone to communicate error, risk, or data interpretation.
